01A.name: Concierge Royal Suite with Oceanview Verandah
01A.description: Master bedroom with king bed, children's bedroom with bunk bed, & living area with double wall-pull down bed. Large living area, open dining area, bar, & two verandahs accessible from the common area. The forward verandah is also accessible from the master bedroom & includes a whirlpool. Children's room includes a bathroom with shower & overlooks the side verandah. At least one 65" television. Master bathroom includes two sinks, stand-alone bathtub & shower.

01B.name: Concierge 1-Bedroom Oceanview Suite
01B.description: Master bedroom with king bed, living area with double convertible sofa & single wall pull-down bed. Large floor-to-ceiling windows, bathroom with double sink & shower, walk-in closet, minibar, dining area, living area, and at least one 65" television.

01C.name: Concierge 1-Bedroom Oceanview Suite
01C.description: Master bedroom with king bed, living area with double convertible sofa & two single wall pull-down bed. Master bathroom with stand-alone bathtub, walk-in closet in master bedroom, dining area, minibar, second bathroom with shower, & at least one 65" television.

02A.name: Concierge Suite with Oceanview Verandah
02A.description: Master bedroom with king bed, living area with double convertible sofa & secondary bedroom with double bed. Large private verandah, minibar, bathroom with double sink and shower, at least one 65" television, and secondary bedroom/bathroom with shower, separate entrance, & connecting door.

02B.name: Concierge Oceanview Suite
02B.description: Master bedroom with king bed, living area with double convertible sofa & secondary bedroom with double bed. Large floor-to-ceiling windows, bathroom with double sink & shower, minibar, dining area, at least one 65" television, & secondary bedroom/bathroom with shower, separate entrance, & connecting door.

02C.name: Concierge Oceanview Suite
02C.description: Master bedroom with king bed, living area with double convertible sofa & secondary bedroom with double bed. Large floor-to-ceiling windows, bathroom with double sink & shower, minibar, dining area, at least one 65" television, & secondary bedroom/bathroom with shower, separate entrance, & connecting door.

03A.name: Concierge Family Stateroom with Oceanview Verandah
03A.description: King bed, double convertible sofa, & single wall pull-down bed. Large wrap-around verandah with private whirlpool overlooking aft pool/stage area, walk-in closet, one bathroom with double sink & shower, privacy divider, & at least one 65" television.

03B.name: Concierge Family Stateroom with Oceanview Verandah
03B.description: King bed, double convertible sofa, & single wall pull-down bed. Large wrap-around verandah (size varies by deck) overlooking at pool/stage area, walk-in closet, one bathroom with double sink and shower, privacy divider, & at least one 65" television.

03C.name: Concierge Family Oceanview Suite
03C.description: Master bedroom with king bed, living area with double convertible sofa & single wall pull-down. Split bath, dining area, minibar, window bench, & at least one 65" television.

04A.name: Concierge Family Stateroom with Garden View Verandah
04A.description: King bed, double convertible sofa, & secondary bedroom with double bed. Private verandah, privacy divider, bathroom with double sink and shower, at least one 65" television, & secondary bedroom/bathroom with shower, separate entrance, & connecting door.

04B.name: Concierge Family Stateroom with Garden View Verandah
04B.description: King bed, double convertible sofa, & secondary bedroom with double bed. Private verandah, privacy divider, bathroom with double sink and shower, at least one 65" television, & secondary bedroom/bathroom with shower, separate entrance, & connecting door.

04C.name: Concierge Family Stateroom with Oceanview Verandah
04C.description: King bed, double convertible sofa & secondary bedroom with double bed. Private verandah, privacy divider, bathroom with double sink & shower, at least one 65" television, & secondary bedroom/bathroom with shower, separate entrance, & connecting door.

04D.name: Concierge Inside Family Stateroom
04D.description: King bed, double convertible sofa & secondary bedroom with double bed. Privacy divider, bathroom with double sink and shower, at least one 65" television, & secondary bedroom/bathroom with shower, separate entrance, and connecting door.

05A.name: Deluxe Garden Stage View Stateroom with Verandah
05A.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, privacy divider, 50" television, & private verandah overlooking the Disney Imagination Garden.

05B.name: Deluxe Garden View Stateroom with Verandah
05B.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, privacy divider, 50" television, & private verandah overlooking the Disney Imagination Garden.

05C.name: Deluxe Reef View Stateroom with Verandah
05C.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, privacy divider, 50" television, & private verandah overlooking the Discovery Reef.

06A.name: Deluxe Oceanview Stateroom with Verandah
06A.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, privacy divider, 50" television, & private verandah overlooking the ocean.

06B.name: Deluxe Oceanview Stateroom with Verandah
06B.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, privacy divider, 50" television, & private verandah overlooking the ocean.

06C.name: Deluxe Oceanview Stateroom with Verandah
06C.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, privacy divider, 50" television, & private verandah overlooking the ocean.

06D.name: Deluxe Oceanview Stateroom with Verandah
06D.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, privacy divider, 50" television, & private verandah overlooking the ocean.

07A.name: Stateroom with Verandah
07A.description: Two single bench beds, two single wall pull-down beds, one above each bench. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, 32" television & private verandah overlooking either the ocean, Disney Imagination Garden or the Discovery Reef.

08A.name: Deluxe Oceanview Stateroom
08A.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, privacy divider, 50" television, & window overlooking the ocean.

09A.name: Oceanview Stateroom
09A.description: Two single bench beds, two single wall pull-down beds, one above each bench. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, 32" television, & window overlooking the ocean.

10A.name: Deluxe Inside Stateroom with Reef View
10A.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, privacy divider, 50" television, & window overlooking the Discovery Reef.

10B.name: Deluxe Inside Stateroom
10B.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, 50" television, & privacy divider.

10C.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, 50" television, & privacy divider.

10D.description: Queen bed, double convertible sofa. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, 50" television, & privacy divider.

11A.name: Inside Stateroom
11A.description: Two single bench beds, two single wall pull-down beds, one above each bench. Split bathroom, shower with glass door, & 32" television.
